name: 10.25" x 6" x 6" Small Woven Twisted Paper Rope Tapered Basket Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your home organized and stylish with this Small Twisted Paper Rope Tapered Basket from Brightroom™. Showcasing paper rope detailing for a natural appeal, this spacious rectangular basket allows ample room to stow away anything from your kids' toys to throw blankets or magazines with ease, keeping your floors and tables clean and clutter-free. The open top allows you to quickly and easily see what's inside, and built-in handles lend easy transport from room to room. Use this paper rope basket near a sofa or entryway console to stow away extras in style.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.

Overall Dimensions: 6 Inches (H), 6 Inches (W), 10.25 Inches (L)
Bottom Dimensions: 4.33 Inches (W), 8.66 Inches (L)
Interior Dimensions: 5.75 Inches (H), 5.5 Inches (W), 9.75 Inches (L)
